title: 天皇賞（秋）の後に・いつもの2人

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Daiwa Scarlet seizes victory at one of the
greatest events in racing—the autumn Tenno Sho.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She finally realizes that being number one means
living forever in the hearts of all who watch her
race.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Next, she sets her sights on the Arima Kinen,
where she vows she will become the number one
Umamusume of all time.
